Title: Parse org chart images

Backdated: 2026-04-20
Milestone: Chatbot, voice, and module flows

As a account operator
I want org-chart images parsed into people records
So that relationship maps can start from visual source material

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Image uploads can call a dedicated image-parse endpoint.
- [ ] The returned payload includes people data and org-structure observations.

Notes: The endpoint exists and is wired from accounts uploads; I did not validate output quality on real org charts.
